item.title: No. 17 St. John's Beats Providence After 19-Minute Delay for In-Game Fight
item.description: No. 17 St. John’s got a road victory over Providence on Saturday, which included a 19-minute delay in the action for a fight.

item.title: Iowa State Handles Kansas in Ranked, Big 12 Win, Ends Jayhawks' Winning Streak
item.description: Iowa State overcame a slow start to get a convincing, ranked win over Kansas in a Big 12 conference showdown on Saturday.

item.title: USA Hockey Odds: How to Bet on Team USA Hockey This Weekend as They Face Denmark and Germany
